description_long: This armchair features a boxy, geometric design with broad, angular armrests and a deep, wide seat. The upholstery is a solid, muted coral-pink color, giving it a modern and inviting appearance. The backrest is slightly reclined and extends to the same height as the armrests, providing ample support. The seat and backrest appear to be padded, offering comfort for sitting. The chair stands on four short, sturdy wooden legs with a faceted, blocky shape and a dark brown finish. The overall construction suggests a blend of comfort and durability, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern, coral-pink armchair with broad angular armrests, padded seat and backrest, and sturdy dark wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, padded backrest, and broad angular armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick armrest, the depth of the seat, and the faceted wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned backrest and the full width of the chair.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest profile and the chair's overall boxy silhouette.
attribute_armrest_design: broad, angular, and upholstered in matching fabric
attribute_backrest_style: medium-high, straight, and padded with a flat top
